status: height: 50px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: 0 28px 0 24px; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--text-primary);
search-pill: flex: 1; display: flex; align-items: center; height: 36px; border-radius: 8px; background: var(--surface-2); padding: 0 12px; gap: 8px;
icon-btn: width: 32px; height: 32px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; color: var(--text-primary);
bal-label: font-size: 12px; color: var(--text-secondary); display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px;
bal-value: font-family: var(--mono); font-size: 28px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--text-primary); margin-top: 4px; letter-spacing: -0.5px;
bal-pnl: font-family: var(--mono); font-size: 12px; color: var(--up); margin-top: 4px;
quick-btn: flex: 1; height: 36px; border-radius: 8px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600;
mt: font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--text-secondary); padding-bottom: 10px; position: relative;
mkt-row: display: flex; align-items: center; padding: 12px 16px; gap: 10px;
coin-ico: width: 30px; height: 30px; border-radius: 50%; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700; color: #0B0E11; flex-shrink: 0;
mkt-px: font-family: var(--mono); font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--text-primary);
mkt-usd: font-family: var(--mono); font-size: 11px; color: var(--text-secondary); margin-top: 2px;
mkt-chg: min-width: 64px; text-align: center; font-family: var(--mono); font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; color: #fff; padding: 6px 0; border-radius: 4px; margin-left: 8px;
tab: display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; color: var(--text-tertiary); font-size: 10px; font-weight: 500; gap: 4px;
